DISCOVERY 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JULIANA DROUS' MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S DISCOVERY RESPONSES, TO HAVE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION DEEMED ADMITTED AND REQUEST FOR DISCOVERY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED. IT APPEARS THAT THERE IS NO OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION OF DEFENDANT JULIANA DROUS; ACCORDINGLY, THE MOTION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY WILL PREPARE AN APPROPRIATE ORDER AND SUBMIT IT TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND SUBMIT THE PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT AT THE HEARING ON NOV. 5, 2012. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $700.00 ARE AWARDED TO MS. DROUS. ORDER SIGNED. PAUL RENNE, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT DROUS, JULIANA ESQ

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JULIANA DROUS' MOTION FOR AN ORDER REQUIRING PLAINTIFF TO FURNISH SECURITY AND FOR PRE-FILING ORDER PROHIBITING VEXATIOUS LITIGANT FROM FILING NEW LITIGATION IN PROPRIA PERSONA IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT FINDS PURSUANT TO CIVIL PROCEDURE CODE SECTION 391 ET SEQ., INCLUDING 391.1, THAT PLAINTIFF IS A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT AND THAT THERE IS NOT A REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT HE WILL PREVAIL IN THE LITIGATION AGAINST THE MOVING DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO POST SECURITY IN THE AMOUNT OF $3000 WITHIN 20 DAYS OF THIS ORDER. A PRE-FILING ORDER WILL ISSUE PROHIBITING PLAINTIFF HARTMAN FROM FILING ANY NEW LITIGATION IN THE COURTS OF THIS STATE IN PROPRI PERSONA WITHOUT FIRST OBTAINING LEAVE OF THE PRESIDING JUSTICE OR PRESIDING JUDGE, PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 391.7. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-31-2013 Vacated

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For An Order Requiring Pltf To Furnish Security And For Prefiling Order Prohibiting Vexatious Litigant From Filing New Litigation In Propria Persona
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JULIANA DROUS' Motion For An Order Requiring Plaintiff To Furnish Security And For Pre-filing Order Prohibiting Vexatious Litigant From Filing New Litigation In Propria Persona is granted. No opposition filed. The Court finds pursuant to Civil Procedure Code section 391 et seq., including 391.1, that plaintiff is a vexatious litigant and that there is not a reasonable probability that he will prevail in the litigation against the moving defendant. Plaintiff is ordered to post security in the amount of $3000 within 20 days of this order. A pre-filing order will issue prohibiting Plaintiff Hartman from filing any new litigation in the Courts of this state in propri persona without first obtaining leave of the presiding justice or presiding judge, pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure 391.7. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Motion To Compel Ptlf'S Discovery Responses, To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted And Request For Discovery Sanctions Against Pltf
Off Calendar Nov-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Bryce Gray, Rankin Sproat Mires Beaty & Reynolds, 510.465.3922, appearing for the Defendant.
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Ruling: THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JULIANA DROUS' Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Discovery Responses, To Have Requests For Admission Deemed Admitted And Request For Discovery Sanctions Against Plaintiff is GRANTED. IT APPEARS THAT THERE IS NO OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION OF DEFENDANT JULIANA DROUS; ACCORDINGLY, THE MOTION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE MOVING PARTY WILL PREPARE AN APPROPRIATE ORDER AND SUBMIT IT TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND SUBMIT THE PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT AT THE HEARING ON NOV. 5, 2012. Sanctions in the amount of $700.00 are awarded to Ms. Drous. Order signed. Paul Renne, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =302/JPT
